name: Bright Dental
knowledge: Bright Dental is located at 88 Willow Avenue, Riverside. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Closed Saturday and Sunday. Phone: (555) 340-9911. Services: routine cleanings, teeth whitening, fillings, and same-day emergency appointments for existing patients. New patient exams are $89 for the first visit, which includes X-rays. We accept Delta Dental and Cigna insurance, and self-pay plans are available. Sedation dentistry is available for anxious patients — ask the front desk when booking. We see children starting at age 3. Cleanings require an appointment; we do not accept walk-ins for cleanings, but emergencies are seen same-day when possible. After-hours emergencies: call the main number and leave a message; we return calls within 2 hours during business days.
